paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.66 as of July 22, 2026, representing a 0.08% increase from the prior close and a 25.81% decrease over the past 22 sessions.

Recent news headlines include announcements of the company's second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, as well as discussions around the departure of a director and the completion of a $375 million convertible notes offering. These events have led to questions about governance and the company's valuation.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and an 8-K announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. Additionally, there has been one Form 4 filing and 17 proxy solicitation filings in the feed.
